headline: Top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index during Friday's after-hours session.
summary: The US market session of Friday is over, let's have a look at the top S&P500 gainers and losers in the after hours session today.

headline: Exploring the top movers within the dow jones index during today's session.
summary: Curious about the top performers within the dow jones index one hour before the close of the markets on Friday? Dive into the list of today's session's top gainers and losers for a comprehensive overview.

headline: 1 Industrials Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Question
summary: Industrials businesses quietly power the physical things we depend on, from cars and homes to e-commerce infrastructure. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 19.1% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 10% return.

headline: A Look At Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Valuation After UBS Downgrade And AkzoNobel Bid Withdrawal
summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has been under pressure after UBS cut its rating to Neutral, pointing to a soft U.S. housing market and tempered near term earnings expectations, even as the AkzoNobel pursuit was shelved. See our latest analysis for Sherwin-Williams. At a share price of US$300.09, Sherwin-Williams has seen short term share price pressure, with the 30 day share price return down 3.96% and year to date share price return down 8.46%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 26.68%...
